mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dynamic_process_model ( model_name, model_source_paper, model_author, model_summary, version, model_file, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{modelName}, #{modelSourcePaper}, #{modelAuthor}, #{modelSummary}, #{version}, #{modelFile}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, model_name AS modelName, model_source_paper AS modelSourcePaper, model_author AS modelAuthor, model_summary AS modelSummary, version AS version, /* model_file 不查，防止内存溢出 */ created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM dynamic_process_model WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, model_name AS modelName, model_source_paper AS modelSourcePaper, model_author AS modelAuthor, model_summary AS modelSummary, version AS version, /* model_file 不查 */ created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM dynamic_process_model
AND id = #{id}
AND model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%')
AND model_author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{modelAuthor}, '%')
AND model_source_paper LIKE CONCAT('%', #{modelSourcePaper}, '%')
AND version = #{version}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
